_comment: Physical-seed exemplar for BrickPavementGenerator: running/stretcher bond -- each course offset by half a brick length from the one below. This is the SAME bond BrickWallGenerator's plan (notes/planning/brick_street_scene_plan_2026_07_14.md sec2.3/sec4 node 4) already specs for wall facades, offered here as an alternate pedestrian-area PAVEMENT mode (sidewalks/plazas in the reference image, not the vehicular street itself, which defaults to herringbone -- notes/research/brick_street_construction_methods_2026_07_16.md sec2). Real paver ratio: length = 2 x width, brick_width=0.1m / brick_length=0.2m, matching the herringbone exemplar's scale so swapping the seed_handle mid-scene never changes the physical brick size, only the arrangement.
_verification: Single-brick unit cell, lattice_a=(brick_length,0) (repeat along a course), lattice_b=(brick_length/2, brick_width) (each course up shifts by half a brick length) -- the textbook running-bond construction, confirmed gap-free/overlap-free at 100.0000% coverage by the same raster verification method as the herringbone exemplar.
